CurrentIssues.ID: CyclomaticComplexMethod:MarketDataFailureAuditService.kt$MarketDataFailureAuditService$suspend fun recordFailure( upstream: String, operation: String, reason: String, symbol: String? = null, instrumentId: String? = null, instrumentName: String? = null, valuationSource: String? = null, purchaseDate: LocalDate? = null, from: LocalDate? = null, to: LocalDate? = null, exception: Throwable? = null )

LongMethod:AppModule.kt$fun appModule( config: PersistenceConfig, marketDataConfig: MarketDataConfig, backupConfig: BackupConfig, readModelRefreshConfig: ReadModelRefreshConfig, authConfig: AuthConfig, repositoryBindingMode: RepositoryBindingMode = RepositoryBindingMode.SQLITE_RUNTIME )

LongParameterList:JdbcParityTest.kt$JdbcParityTest$( id: UUID, accountId: UUID, instrumentId: UUID?, type: TransactionType, tradeDate: LocalDate, quantity: BigDecimal?, unitPrice: BigDecimal?, grossAmount: BigDecimal, currency: String, feeAmount: BigDecimal = BigDecimal.ZERO, taxAmount: BigDecimal = BigDecimal.ZERO )

LongParameterList:JdbcParityTest.kt$JdbcParityTest.Harness$( private val accountRepository: AccountRepository, private val appPreferenceRepository: AppPreferenceRepository, private val instrumentRepository: InstrumentRepository, private val transactionRepository: TransactionRepository, private val transactionImportProfileRepository: TransactionImportProfileRepository, private val portfolioTargetRepository: PortfolioTargetRepository, private val auditEventRepository: AuditEventRepository, private val transactionRunner: PersistenceTransactionRunner, private val closeAction: () -> Unit )

LongParameterList:PortfolioAllocationServiceTest.kt$PortfolioAllocationServiceTest$( id: UUID, accountId: UUID, instrumentId: UUID?, type: TransactionType, tradeDate: LocalDate, quantity: BigDecimal?, unitPrice: BigDecimal?, grossAmount: BigDecimal, settlementDate: LocalDate = tradeDate )
UseCheckOrError:JdbcWriteRepositoriesTest.kt$JdbcWriteRepositoriesTest.<no name provided>$throw IllegalStateException("Simulated transaction write failure.")
UseRequire:PortfolioBackupService.kt$PortfolioBackupService$throw IllegalArgumentException("Backup file name is not valid.")
